title: Sampling, bias, resampling — and pattern review

items.label: Best Time TO Buy And Sell Stock
interviewQuestions: Walk through the one-pass min-so-far trick. Why is it correct?
What if you can buy and sell unlimited times? What about with a cooldown or fee?

items.label: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
interviewQuestions: Why is this a sliding window? What's the invariant inside the window?
What if the alphabet is huge (Unicode) vs tiny (ASCII)? Does that change your data structure?

items.label: Random, stratified, cluster, importance sampling
interviewQuestions: Compare simple random sampling vs stratified sampling — when does stratification reduce variance?
What is importance sampling and where does it show up in ML?

items.label: Selection bias, survivorship bias, response bias
interviewQuestions: Give an example where selection bias silently broke a model deployment.
What is survivorship bias and where does it hurt model evaluation?

items.label: Resampling for class imbalance & uncertainty
interviewQuestions: What's the difference between bootstrapping for uncertainty vs resampling for imbalance?
When does oversampling the minority class help and when does it leak?
